criteria.notes: Plain HTML/CSS site with no React or @amsterdam/design-system-react used.
Custom CSS only; no --ams-* design tokens or Tailwind bridge present.
No ADS Grid/Column 4/8/12 layout system used; layout is custom CSS.
Header and footer are custom HTML elements, not ADS Header/Footer components.
Newsletter form uses plain HTML input/button, not ADS form components.
No banned libraries (MUI, shadcn, Chakra, etc.) are used; it's plain HTML/CSS.
All visible text in the screenshot is written in Dutch.
Sentences are often long and complex with technical jargon like 'BREEAM-certificering' and 'klimaatadaptatie', above B1 level.
Screenshot shows 5 substantive content paragraphs; agent verified 5 per page programmatically.
Content references real projects (Zuidasdok, Valley-toren, EDGE Zuid, ABN AMRO, Beatrixpark) with plausible figures.
Consistent professional, informative tone throughout the page.
Three separate HTML pages (index, projecten, toekomst) linked via navigation.
Newsletter signup form clearly visible with email input and 'Aanmelden' button.
Top navigation bar with Home, Projecten, and Toekomstvisie links visible in screenshot.
